title: Macrobiotic Meal Thai Noodles Pad Thai
description: A resinous and flaky Thai dish featuring Chinese sesame sauce, slow-cooked to perfection with macrobiotic-friendly ingredients. This meal-prep pad thai is a delicious and healthy twist on a classic Isaan dish.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the cubed tofu and cook until it is lightly browned on all sides.
Add the Chinese sesame sauce, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles, bean sprouts, and chopped peanuts to the skillet, and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the pad thai for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, to allow the flavors to meld together.
Serve the pad thai hot, garnished with additional chopped peanuts and bean sprouts if desired.
